commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
[Unit]
Description=vLLM Auto-Tuner Backend Service
After=network.target docker.service
Requires=docker.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=data_team
Group=data_team
WorkingDirectory=/opt/vllm-autotuner
ExecStart=/bin/bash /opt/vllm-autotuner/scripts/start.sh
ExecStop=/bin/bash /opt/vllm-autotuner/scripts/stop.sh
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5
StandardOutput=syslog
StandardError=syslog
SyslogIdentifier=vllm-autotuner

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
